Notice Of Motion And Motin For Order To Compel Further Answers To Non-Form Interrogatories, Requests For Admissions And Fro Reasonable Attorney'S Fees; Memorandum Of P/A; Separate Statement Of Items In Dispute; Declaration Of Ronald M. Toran; Request For Judicial Notice; Pos
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ronald M. Toran, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Henry Stevens
Joanna Kozubal, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Yolanda Paul

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Henry Stevens's motion to compel further responses to requests for admissions and special interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to interrogatories 4 and 6. The motion is denied as to requests for admissions 1 and 2 and interrogatories 1, 2, 5, 13-15. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Tonald M. Toran for plaintiff and moving party: Henry Stevens

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Henry Stevens' motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and requests for admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve further responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $740 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
